urdu transliteration text: ISS PARDE KI KHAATIR MERAA ABBAAS BHI MARJAAE
english translation text: For this veil my Abbas Be sacrificed

urdu transliteration text: AKBAR KE SINAA SINE PE LAGTI HAI TO LAGJAAE
english translation text: Should a spear pierce the heart of AKBAR, so be it

urdu transliteration text:
REH-JAAE MERI ZAINABE DILGIR KAA PARDAA
If only my broken hearted Zainab's veil is spared
HAMSHIR KAA PARDAA MERI DILGIR KA PARDAA
english translation text: The veil of my sister, the veil of the heartbroken
